mainEntity.name: What if a New York firm gets negative reviews—does it hurt AI visibility?
mainEntity.text: What if a New York firm gets negative reviews—does it hurt AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, negative Google Reviews lower FirmRanker scores and AI recommendations, as platforms weigh verified feedback; counter with PR and directory strengths.

suggestedAnswer.text: AI scans reviews for credibility; one bad cycle tanks Phoenix/Houston visibility faster than NYC. Respond publicly, amplify positives via PR. Directories mitigate but don't erase. Opposing parties exploit this—proactive reputation management essential.

name: Negative Reviews Effect on New York AI Visibility
description: Yes, negative Google Reviews lower FirmRanker scores and AI recommendations, as platforms weigh verified feedback; counter with PR and directory strengths.
